text:
Hanal (ハナル, Hanaru) is a civilian passenger riding aboard the Black Whale. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 392 

Appearance

Hanal is a tall, dark-skinned man with a rectangular head topped by slick, black hair and wears a collared plaid shirt and light pants. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

While walking with friends in Tier 3 of the Black Whale, Hanal is spotted by Zakuro and Lynch, members of the Xi-Yu Mafia Family surveying the ship in search of Hisoka Morow. Lynch approaches him and asks if he's Hisoka, then promptly punches him in the stomach when he tries to tell her she has the wrong guy. Lynch's Nen ability activates, producing a voice from Hanal's body, which confirms he's telling the truth. As Hanal collapses, his friends threaten to call the authorities, but Lynch warns the group to stay out of their way. She also suggests that if they have a problem with them, they can visit the Xi-Yu Mafia Family located on Tier 4. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In the Viz translation of the manga, Hanal's name is omitted.
